title: 20 Luxury Gift Present Tags for Christmas – Purple & Blue Midnight Forest Theme – Reindeer Winter Scene – Silver Ribbon – Large 11x6cm – 4 Designs – Blank Back – Eco Friendly – Recyclable Packaging
features: 🎄 LUXURY PURPLE & BLUE GIFT TAGS – Add a premium touch to your wrapping with these beautifully designed Christmas gift tags in rich purple and blue tones, inspired by a magical midnight forest.
🦌 4 ENCHANTING WINTER DESIGNS – Features elegant reindeer, snow-covered trees and twilight scenes – perfect for adding festive charm to any gift.
✍️ BLANK WHITE BACK FOR GREETINGS – The reverse of each tag is a clean white card, perfect for writing your own Christmas messages, names, or personal greetings.
🎀 SILVER RIBBON INCLUDED – Each tag comes pre-threaded with shiny silver ribbon, ready to attach to your gifts with ease.
♻️ ECO-FRIENDLY RECYCLABLE PACKAGING – Packaged in widely recyclable cardboard, making these a beautiful and sustainable choice for your festive wrapping.
description: 🎁 Make your presents stand out this Christmas with these luxury Purple & Blue Christmas Gift Tags from YLAB (You Love A Bargain). Featuring dreamy midnight forest scenes with reindeer and snowy pine trees, these tags bring a stylish and sophisticated touch to your holiday wrapping. 💜 The colour palette blends deep purples , frosty blues , and wintry whites , complementing a wide range of gift wrap styles and festive packaging. 📏 Each tag is generously sized at 11 x 6 cm , offering plenty of room to add your own festive message. ✍️ The reverse side is made from blank white card , ideal for writing names, heartfelt notes, or seasonal greetings. 🧵 Supplied with pre-attached silver ribbon , they’re easy to use and look stunning on boxes, bags, and hampers alike. 🌍 Thoughtfully packaged in eco-friendly, recyclable cardboard , they’re perfect for a more sustainable Christmas. 🎨 Set Includes: 20 Gift Tags (5 each of 4 purple & blue winter designs ) Silver ribbon already attached Blank white reverse for messages Recyclable cardboard packaging
